name: consulting agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For consulting agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of billing records and time tracking.
problem_solved: Inaccurate billing reconciliation leading to cash flow gaps.
features: manual entry for client billing records
manual entry for project time tracking
